requirement_topic.en: Market Access and General Product Safety — Australian Consumer Law
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入及通用产品安全——澳大利亚消费者法
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入及通用產品安全——澳洲消費者法

summary.en: Australia does not require a single furniture market-access mark equivalent to CE or UKCA for ordinary domestic furniture. The mandatory legal framework is the Australian Consumer Law under the Competition and Consumer Act 2010: suppliers must not supply goods that are unsafe, banned, recalled, falsely described, or non-compliant with applicable mandatory safety or information standards. For furniture, the high-priority mandatory checks are the toppling furniture information standard and the button/coin battery standards where electronics or remotes are included.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚对普通家用家具没有类似CE或UKCA的统一市场准入标志。强制性法律框架来自《2010年竞争与消费者法》下的澳大利亚消费者法：供应商不得供应不安全、被禁止、被召回、描述不实或不符合适用强制安全/信息标准的商品。家具类产品的重点强制筛查包括家具倾倒信息标准，以及在含电子功能或遥控器时适用的纽扣/硬币电池标准。
summary.zht: 澳洲對普通家用家具沒有類似CE或UKCA的統一市場准入標誌。強制性法律框架來自《2010年競爭與消費者法》下的澳洲消費者法：供應商不得供應不安全、被禁止、被召回、描述不實或不符合適用強制安全/資訊標準的商品。家具類產品的重點強制篩查包括家具傾倒資訊標準，以及在含電子功能或遙控器時適用的鈕扣/硬幣電池標準。

standards_or_laws: Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law
ACCC Product Safety mandatory standards framework
Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024 — mandatory where in scope
Button and coin battery mandatory safety and information standards — mandatory where in scope

summary.en: Chinese furniture manufacturers commonly hold GB or GB/T product test reports, factory inspection records, quality manuals, and export buyer specifications. These documents may support safety evidence but do not replace Australian Consumer Law responsibilities or any applicable ACCC mandatory standards.
summary.zh: 中国家具制造商通常持有GB或GB/T产品检测报告、工厂检验记录、质量手册及出口买方规范。这些文件可作为安全证据的一部分，但不能替代澳大利亚消费者法责任或适用的ACCC强制标准。
summary.zht: 中國家具製造商通常持有GB或GB/T產品檢測報告、工廠檢驗記錄、品質手冊及出口買方規範。這些文件可作為安全證據的一部分，但不能替代澳洲消費者法責任或適用的ACCC強制標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3324 — wooden furniture general technical requirements
GB 28481 — safety technical requirements for furniture where applicable
Factory quality control and buyer procurement specifications

gap.en: The gap is not a missing Australian furniture mark; it is SKU-by-SKU legal screening. Importers should map every furniture SKU against ACCC mandatory standards, banned goods, recall history, warnings, instructions, stability evidence, electrical or battery accessories, and misleading-claim risk before supply.
gap.zh: 差距不在于缺少某个澳大利亚家具标志，而在于逐个SKU进行法律筛查。进口商在供应前应将每个家具SKU对应ACCC强制标准、禁售商品、召回记录、警示、说明书、稳定性证据、电气或电池配件以及误导性宣称风险进行核对。
gap.zht: 差距不在於缺少某個澳洲家具標誌，而在於逐個SKU進行法律篩查。進口商在供應前應將每個家具SKU對應ACCC強制標準、禁售商品、召回記錄、警示、說明書、穩定性證據、電氣或電池配件以及誤導性宣稱風險進行核對。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal framework — Australian Consumer Law applies to supplied consumer goods; specific ACCC mandatory safety or information standards apply only where the furniture or accessory is in scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mixed — Chinese GB mandatory standards may apply to some furniture categories, while many export tests are voluntary or buyer-driven

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ordinary furniture normally has no single Australian approval mark, but the Australian supplier still carries ACL product-safety responsibility. Screen each SKU for toppling furniture, button/coin battery, electrical accessory, warning-label, recall and unsafe-product risks before supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】普通家具通常没有单一澳大利亚批准标志，但澳大利亚供应商仍承担澳大利亚消费者法下的产品安全责任。供应前应逐个SKU筛查家具倾倒、纽扣/硬币电池、电气配件、警示标签、召回及不安全产品风险。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】普通家具通常沒有單一澳洲批准標誌，但澳洲供應商仍承擔澳洲消費者法下的產品安全責任。供應前應逐個SKU篩查家具傾倒、鈕扣/硬幣電池、電氣配件、警示標籤、召回及不安全產品風險。
